news.t: Tradr Launches First Mover Leveraged ETFs on CLSK, CRDO, ENPH, GS and U

overview.description: The Tradr 2X Long APLD Daily ETF (APLX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund provides 2x exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement of Applied Digital stock (NASDAQ: APLD). Applied Digital is a designer, developer, and operator of digital infrastructure solutions in North America APLX was launched on Sep 8, 2025 and is issued by Tradr.

data.title: Tradr Launches First Mover Leveraged ETFs on CLSK, CRDO, ENPH, GS and U
data.text: Single-stock funds seek to provide 200% long exposure on a variety of industry leaders NEW YORK , Sept. 16, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Tradr ETFs, a provider of ETFs designed for sophisticated investors and...
